title: hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. doerfleri
intro: Hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. doerfleri is a lesser-known species within the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as the hawkweed plant, specifically a subspecies of Hieracium andrasovszkyi. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. doerfleri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various skin issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium andrasovszkyi subsp. doerfleri can be made by infusing the plant's leaves or flowers in water to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams that can be applied directly to affected areas.
